archetype: 4 - Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Professional Corporate Body)
core_principles: Authority and Clarity: Ensure the highest standard of professionalism, appealing to Chartered Accountants.
Bento Grids for Density: Data-heavy areas like noticeboards and event lists should use strict bento layouts.
Color is Function: Use navy blue to establish trust, with high contrast typography for readability.
Mobile-First Navigation: Clear hierarchy with easy access to circulars and registrations on smaller devices.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-semibold

typography.guidelines: Do not center-align headings unless necessary for hero symmetry. Always use left alignment for forms and dense content.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Use asymmetric bento grid for home updates (md:grid-cols-12, span 8 and span 4) to break monotony while retaining corporate rigidity.

components.header: Crystal Glass style if sticky (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200), containing Logo, Navigation, and a solid primary CTA for Login/Contact.
components.footer: Dark Theme Footer (bg-[#0A1E3F] text-white) to anchor the page, massive spacing (py-20), clear columns for quick links.
components.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle rounded (rounded-sm). Primary: bg-[#0A1E3F] text-white hover:bg-[#173059]. Secondary: border border-[#0A1E3F] text-[#0A1E3F] hover:bg-slate-50.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no heavy shadow by default. Hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1.
components.noticeboard_table: Shadcn Table. Crisp borders, alternating row colors (bg-slate-50), hover states for PDF downloads.

interactions_and_motion.hover: All interactive elements must change state visually. Text contrast must remain accessible.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Framer motion for gentle upward fade-ins on scroll (staggered for lists).

images.description: Abstract corporate navy background for primary hero overlay
Modern office building exterior for professional vibe
Modern office building exterior for professional vibe

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind CSS for the main marketing/informational layout.

Ensure the hero overlay on images is NEVER darker than bg-black/50, and consider gradient overlays (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A1E3F]/90 to-transparent) to ensure readability without killing the image.
Implement heavily customized Shadcn UI for structured data: Data tables for Noticeboard/Newsletters, Cards for Events, and Dialogs for registrations.
Keep standard pages aligned left; use high-contrast text to ensure accessibility.
Provide empty state UI for events/notices if no data is found.
